3273060.name: Bound: Gulag Getaway
3273060.description:
Bound: Gulag Getaway

Escape the slammer in this frantic 4-player co-op adventure! Race against your friends though the gulag, dodging bumbling guards and causing mayhem along the way

Key Features:

  • Unique procedural animation system for hilariously unpredictable movements

  • 4-player competitive co-op - first one out wins!

  • Retro-inspired pixel graphics

  • Dynamic environments filled with usable objects

  • Outwit and outmaneuver AI-driven drunk guards

  • Squeeze through vents, and improvise your escape

Grab whatever you can find to slow down guards and sabotage other players. Will you form alliances or betray your fellow inmates? In Bound: Gulag Getaway, freedom is just a stumble away!
3273060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
